title: Reset Device - Restore Defaults - Restore - No
scenario: Verify that tapping "No" on the Restore Defaults confirmation popup closes the popup without resetting the device and keeps the user on the settings screen.
steps: Open Lens App with a headset connected.
Verify the 'Restore Defaults' field is displayed with a 'Restore' button and explanatory text.
Verify the 'Clear Trusted Devices' field is displayed with a 'Clear' button and text.
Verify a confirmation popup appears with the message 'Are you sure you want to restore to default settings?' and two buttons: 'No' and 'Yes'.
Verify the popup closes, the device is not reset, and the user remains on the same settings screen.
expected: The confirmation popup closes, the device is not reset, and the user remains on the same settings screen.
